invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破1900（近期低点）或融资费率转正超过0.005%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 1900 (recent low) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005% (short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破80（近期低点）或融资费率转正超过0.005%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 80 (recent low) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005% (short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格突破0.102（近期高点）或融资费率Z-score降至负值（多头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks above 0.102 (recent high) or funding rate Z-score drops to negative (long pressure easing).
